data.name: Hentai World Festival
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a captivating puzzle adventure where you piece together stunning images of alluring girls. Arrange the fragments to unveil vivid and delightful artwork that will spark your imagination.

The game features a wide array of beautifully crafted characters, challenging you to strategically place and align puzzle pieces. As you advance, you’ll unlock even more breathtaking visuals, all without the pressure of time limits, allowing you to play at your own pace.

With its simple yet engaging gameplay, this game promises hours of enjoyment, making it a perfect choice for a relaxing and entertaining experience.

Key Features:

Stunning illustrations of charming girls, paired with calming background music.

Unlock full-view mode to admire each completed image in its entirety.

Numerous levels with varying difficulty to keep the experience fresh and engaging.

data.short_description: Dive into a mesmerizing puzzle adventure as you assemble beautiful images of charming girls. Put the pieces together to uncover vivid and delightful artwork that will inspire your imagination.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
